testingSurface: GPU benchmark output via SSH + Docker on dev server (root@192.168.1.198)

VAL-CROSS-002.notes: Historical benchmarks (final_report.md, tp4_sprint4_report.md, etc.) confirm >= 0.99 cosine similarity and no numerical drift
